project_type: Google Colab notebook-style Python script for LTX-2 video generation
build_system: py_compile for syntax validation; no build step (single-file script)
test_framework: No test suite - validation is py_compile and manual Colab execution
verification_instructions: 1. Run py_compile to ensure valid Python syntax. 2. Verify all @param annotations are valid Colab form format. 3. Confirm print() outputs match existing style.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - single Python file
environment_constraints: No external dependencies needed for validation. The file is designed for Google Colab but can be py_compiled anywhere. No pip install needed for static analysis.
contribution_requirements: Keep @param annotations in Colab format. Use box-drawing section headers matching existing style. All code must pass py_compile.
key_patterns: Section headers use: # followed by box-drawing chars and CELL N - TITLE
Each cell ends with print() statements summarizing what was configured
VRAMManager singleton: _VRAM_MGR (defined around line 286, instantiated later)
generate_pro() resolves overrides: _flag = param if param is not None else GLOBAL
Insertion point for new cells: after line 4135 (last print of Cell 3), before line 4138 (Cell 4 header)
directory_structure: Single file project: /projects/sandbox/ltx/LTX_PRO.py (8141 lines). Supporting JSON workflow files (LD-I2V.json, SVI-Pro-Workflow.json) for reference.
